description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs: build_cpu and window_build_cpu. The build_cpu job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-16.04, ubuntu-18.04, and macos-latest operating systems with Atlas, MKL, and OpenBLAS BLAS backends. The job should check out the repository, initialize submodules, download and install Ninja and CMake, install dependencies, configure CMake, and build and test the project. The window_build_cpu job should run on windows-latest and install VCPKG dependencies, download Ninja, configure CMake, and build and test the project.
